summary: W1366 adds a checked quotient and closed-quotient source-difference W532 transfer wrapper guard for representative-image, top-target, and compact-target variants. The wrappers convert quotient right-open boundary data to LCA source-difference packages and delegate to the W1365 source-difference constructors. The original four-task product goal remains open.
known_gaps: Named source-boundary W532 quotient wrappers remain to inspect.
Concrete providers and categorical closure structures remain to be consolidated into the final accepted path.
remaining_work: Continue reducing route surfaces toward the original four-task completion contract.
Preserve product_success=false until the immutable contract is satisfied by Lean and audit evidence.
Keep reference-route evidence aligned with docs/research/reference_route_log.md.
